name: Archfiend Emperor, the First Lord of Horror
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>慄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>凶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ジェネシス・デーモン
name_jp_tl: Evil Emperor of Horror - Genesis Daemon
desc: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing, but its original ATK/DEF become halved. If Summoned this way, this card is destroyed during the End Phase. You cannot Special Summon any monsters, except Fiend monsters. Once per turn: You can banish 1 "Archfiend" card from your hand or GY, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
mnst_eff: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing, but its original ATK/DEF become halved. If Summoned this way, this card is destroyed during the End Phase. You cannot Special Summon any monsters, except Fiend monsters. Once per turn: You can banish 1 "Archfiend" card from your hand or GY, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it.

sets.set: Judgment of the Light: Deluxe Edition

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
